emails.subject: Re: EOL approvals, 03-29-01
emails.body: Re: EOL approvals, 03-29-01 Re: Usinor SA: that appears to be a London counterparty. It should not be on our list. London Legal should approve their counterparties for ALL products, not only European based. Walter Guidroz/ENRON@enronXgate 03/29/2001 02:10 PM

emails.subject: Re: EOL approvals, 03-29-01

emails.subject: RE: EOL approvals, 03-29-01
emails.body: RE: EOL approvals, 03-29-01 Tana, we had to approve them for US steel products. Per the comments in my spreadsheet, London will have to set them up. This was for informational purposes only.
